# Cravin Jamaican Cuisine

> Family-owned Jamaican restaurant serving authentic Caribbean food across three locations in Westchester County, New York — Ossining, White Plains, and Mount Vernon. Operating since 2015. Owner: Peter Murdock. Known for jerk chicken, oxtail, curry goat, ackee & saltfish, and full-service catering for corporate events, weddings, and celebrations (10–500 guests, rated 4.9/5 on ezCater).

Cuisine: Jamaican, Caribbean. Price range: $$ (moderate). Dine-in, takeout, delivery (Uber Eats), and catering. Closed Sundays.

## Locations

- **Ossining** — 109 Main Street, Ossining, NY 10562. Phone: (914) 432-7776. Hours: Mon–Thu 8am–8pm, Fri–Sat 8am–9pm, Sun closed.
- **White Plains** — 74 Mamaroneck Ave, White Plains, NY 10601. Phone: (914) 358-5111. Hours: Mon–Wed 8am–9pm, Thu–Sat 8am–10pm, Sun closed.
- **Mount Vernon** — 529 Gramatan Ave, Mount Vernon, NY 10552. Phone: (914) 588-9202. Hours: Mon–Wed 8am–9pm, Thu–Sat 8am–10pm, Sun closed.

## Menu Highlights

- **Jerk Chicken** — slow-marinated, grilled with scotch bonnet jerk sauce. Sm $15.99 / Lg $19.99. Most popular.
- **Oxtail** — fall-off-the-bone oxtail in rich gravy with butter beans. Sm $19.99 / Lg $24.99.
- **Curry Goat** — slow-cooked goat in aromatic curry with potatoes. Sm $17.99 / Lg $20.99.
- **Ackee & Saltfish** — Jamaica's national dish, served with boiled yam, banana, and dumplings. $16.99.
- **Brown Stew Chicken**, **Curry Chicken**, **Fried Chicken** — Sm $14.25 / Lg $18.50.
- **Jerk Salmon** and **Curry Shrimp** — $20.99. **Snapper Fish Dinner** — $26.99.
- **Vegetarian/Vegan**: Veggie Stew, Callaloo. Many dishes are gluten-free.
- **Baked goods**: Jamaican patties ($4.00), coco bread, bun & cheese, black cake.
- **Drinks**: Sorrel, house fruit punches, ginger beer, Ting, coconut water.

Entrées are served with rice & peas or white rice, plus cabbage or plantains. Full menu with all 46 items and prices: https://www.cravinjc.com/menu

## Catering

Jamaican catering for corporate events, weddings, birthdays, memorials, and holidays. Serves 10–500 guests, roughly $15–25 per person. Order via the website quote builder or ezCater. Trusted by Amazon, U.S. Army, Coca-Cola, Northwell Health, NewYork-Presbyterian, and The Children's Village. Rated 4.9/5 on ezCater.

- Catering page & quote builder: https://www.cravinjc.com/catering
- ezCater: https://www.ezcater.com/catering/pvt/cravin-jamaican-cuisine-3

## Ordering

- Delivery: Uber Eats (per location).
- Pickup: call any location directly.
- Catering: website quote builder or ezCater.
